title: Get dashboards data through API v2
excerpt:
Good morning , I want to get the data from our company’s dashboards, I’m wondering if it is possible using monday’s API v2. 
Thank you.

posts.author: lizarazomiller (Miller Lizarazo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning , I want to get the data from our company’s dashboards, I’m wondering if it is possible using monday’s API v2.

Thank you.

posts.author: nikolamujdzic (Nikola Mujdzic Rescic)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like that to. I had to use Power BI and API instead of just paring that from my dashboard…

Check here Power BI usage: Microsoft Power BI

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lizarazomiller

I’m afraid that monday.com’s API does not currently support the ability to directly query dashboard data. Instead, you’d need to query the data directly from the relevant items on the board(s) they live.

I’ve passed your feedback along to the team here at monday.com for review and consideration as we continue to make improvements to our API

If you have any other suggestions, please let us know!

-Scott
